text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having made a name for herself back home, Oguri Cap transfers to
the acclaimed Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Word of her arrival travels quickly between the trainers, and they
gather around the campus training course to watch her in action.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thanks for running with me, Oguri Cap. Pffft, hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why are you laughing?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my apologies, I did not intend to offend. It has been a long while
since my time has been spent so productively.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've heard many a tall tale about your amazing feats racing in your
regional course, but I only now realize just how true they were.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You are second to none, Oguri Cap. I truly look forward to competing
with you on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see. Then how about a race next time?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Impressive. So that is the renowned Oguri Cap. It's not easy keeping
up with the Emperor herself—and with such a cool head too.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
And to so boldly challenge her to a race. She must truly be confident
in her abilities.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well, I must get going. There's a meet-up I need to attend.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let's do this again sometime, Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right, then...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder where she's headed? Perhaps she's going somewhere else to
train in secret.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Could that be the key to her agility? If so, I most certainly need to
watch this secret practice of hers.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Are you also interested in seeing Oguri's training? Why don't we
all go and watch her together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious to figure out where Oguri Cap was headed, I decide to stick
with the other trainers and go after her.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Is she not going to start training?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
This is Oguri Cap we're talking about. I'm sure there's some meaning
behind her actions... or inaction, in this case.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: She's back! But why?!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: What a peculiar girl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmmmmmm...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
What in the world is going on in that head of hers? That's the fourth
time she's circled around the same area...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Is this girl really second to none? I guess we'll have to see... Let's
come back another day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bewildered by Oguri Cap's perplexing conduct, the trainers slowly
begin to take their leave.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ummm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried about Oguri Cap's strange behavior, I walk over to check on
her.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure. I keep walking and walking, yet I end up at the same
place.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Does this academy really have four identical locations?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Lost, you say... Perhaps so.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Who are you, anyway? I've never seen you around these parts.
choice_data_list: I'm a trainer here at the Academy.
I'm a trainer here at the Academy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A trainer here... Could you show me where to go?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to get back to my dorm room. I would appreciate the
assistance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I give the lost Oguri directions back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So that's where it is. Got it. Thanks for your help. See ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few minutes after seeing off Oguri Cap, she reappears from a
different direction.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I just saw a trainer who looks exactly like you! Are you some
kinda doppelganger?
choice_data_list: You're just back where you started!
You're just back where you started!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...So it appears. Now that you mention it, everything else is the same
too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's a challenge telling what's what in the city. The buildings are all so
close together, not to mention they look the same. Things were much
simpler back home.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I knew my way around town. Turn right at Tome's field, and you could
clearly see my school. The bus stop was to the left of Shige's large
warehouse. So easy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I passed by, Tome would give me some mandarins to
munch on. They were the absolute sweetest. Really takes me back...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sometimes, I guess. But I can't go back just yet.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tome, Shige, Chiyo, and Yoshi... They all helped me get to
central—to race with the best.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Everyone back home is cheering me on.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I cannot—will not—let them down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap gazes on, finishing her little speech with a fierce yet
forlorn expression across her face.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm... It's about time I head back. The dorm was this way, right? I'm
sure it's this way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Concerned that Oguri Cap would spend the rest of the night
endlessly wandering about the campus, I accompanied her back to
her dorm entrance.
